name: ar-agents-bridge-hello
description: Demo: Agentic Commerce Bridge — AP2 + ACP + MCP protocol surfaces wired to MercadoPago. Shows cross-jurisdictional interaction (Wyoming DAO LLC ↔ AR sociedad-IA) per cookbook recipe 21. Not a productive sociedad-IA.
note: Single-library demo. Does NOT claim RFC-003 or RFC-004 conformance — no audit-log endpoints (no /api/play/audit). RFC-003 envelope generation can be done via the reference implementation at https://ar-agents.ar/api/rfc-003-envelope.
